mapper.sql: alevel_question_id, alevel_paper_id, alevel_module_id, parent_question_id, question_code, question_no_display, mark_scheme_question_key, question_type, response_mode, auto_gradable, stem_html, stem_text, content_html, content_text, answer_input_schema_json, max_score, source_page_no, source_bbox_json, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_question WHERE alevel_question_id = #{questionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_question WHERE question_code = #{questionCode} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_question WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_question_id ASC
SELECT FROM alevel_question WHERE alevel_module_id = #{moduleId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_question_id ASC
SELECT FROM alevel_question WHERE parent_question_id = #{parentQuestionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_question_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alevel_question ( alevel_paper_id, alevel_module_id, parent_question_id, question_code, question_no_display, mark_scheme_question_key, question_type, response_mode, auto_gradable, stem_html, stem_text, content_html, content_text, answer_input_schema_json, max_score, source_page_no, source_bbox_json, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{alevelPaperId}, #{alevelModuleId}, #{parentQuestionId}, #{questionCode}, #{questionNoDisplay}, #{markSchemeQuestionKey}, #{questionType}, #{responseMode}, #{autoGradable}, #{stemHtml}, #{stemText}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{answerInputSchemaJson}, #{maxScore}, #{sourcePageNo}, #{sourceBboxJson}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_question SET status = 0, question_code = CONCAT('ARCHIVED_', alevel_question_id), update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1'
UPDATE alevel_question SET status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE alevel_question_id = #{questionId}
